title: Knysna school choirs unite for Heritage Day
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Five Knysna schools, Chris...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Five Knysna schools, Chris Nissen Primary, Fraaisig Primary, Knysna Primary, Concordia High and Percy Mdala High came together in partnership with Knysna Church to celebrate Heritage Day with a music concert.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Five Knysna schools, Chris Nissen Primary, Fraaisig Primary, Knysna Primary, Concordia High and Percy Mdala High came together in partnership with Knysna Church to celebrate Heritage Day with a music concert."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The concert opened with a welcome from Dr Sue Rendall, one of the event’s organisers, and was followed by a performance of The Click Song by a mass choir of 150 young singers, aged 11 to 18."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It was the first time these voices had sung together and the performance set the tone for an unforgettable evening.","html":"It was the first time these voices had sung together and the performance set the tone for an unforgettable evening."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Each choir then took to the stage separately to give a 10-minute repertoire of traditional African and Afrikaans songs. In the middle of the evening the audience had the opportunity to sing Amazing Grace and a three-part version of Shosholoza, without the choirs.","html":"Each choir then took to the stage separately to give a 10-minute repertoire of traditional African and Afrikaans songs. In the middle of the evening the audience had the opportunity to sing Amazing Grace and a three-part version of Shosholoza, without the choirs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The evening continued with performances by the two high school choirs, and came to a rousing close as all choirs and the audience joined in a passionate and energetic performance of the national anthem.","html":"The evening continued with performances by the two high school choirs, and came to a rousing close as all choirs and the audience joined in a passionate and energetic performance of the national anthem."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"While attendance was free, donations were collected and proceeds were shared equally among the five school choirs.","html":"While attendance was free, donations were collected and proceeds were shared equally among the five school choirs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The organisers expressed their gratitude to all the sponsors who made the night possible.","html":"The organisers expressed their gratitude to all the sponsors who made the night possible."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Knysna school choirs unite for Heritage Day
